changes: Owner-policy design revision: resolved OQ-LEDGER-5 for zero-spend owned-account transfers, normal fee/refund semantics, and OQ-LEDGER-6 for hierarchical categories with one active category per transaction; invalidated flat A10 and validated A5/A6. Added DD-LEDGER-CATEGORY-HIERARCHY, acyclic parent history, direct/subtree exact roll-ups, hierarchy-aware contracts and tests. Made approved statements authoritative over agent captures through append-only exact match, statement-derived replacement, explicit dimension carry-forward or unknown initialization, invariant-preserving relationship replacement, and fail-closed ambiguity without storing raw email or statement payloads. OQ-LEDGER-13 and OQ-LEDGER-15 remain open; new OQ-LEDGER-16 isolates cash-withdrawal treatment and OQ-BUDGET-10 isolates parent/subtree budget semantics. Archived PLAN-LEDGER-V1 pending in-place replanning and recompilation; five completed foundation beads require compatibility audit, not rollback.
